defaultSnippets.label: Biome Mesa (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Similar to overworld_surface. Adds colored strata and optional pillars.

• type (string)

defaultSnippets.label: Biome Swamp (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Used to add decoration to the surface of swamp biomes such as water lilies.

anyOf.description:
Properties:
• beach_material (string)
• ceiling_materials (string)
• floor_materials (string)
• foundation_material (string)
• sea_material (string)
• type (string)

defaultSnippets.label: Biome Capped (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Generates surface on blocks with non-solid blocks above or below.

defaultSnippets.label: Biome The End (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Marks a biome as using End dimension terrain generation. Biomes with this component will use the characteristic End terrain style with end stone and void generation.

builder.title: Builder
builder.description: Controls block types and strategy used for terrain generation.
